title: RBI Removes Coӧperatieve Rabobank U.A. From Second Schedule After Banking Status Ceases
description:
RBI notified that Coӧperatieve Rabobank U.A. ceased to be a banking company and directed its exclusion from the RBI Act’s Second Schedule.
The post RBI Removes Coӧperatieve Rabobank U.A. From Second Schedule After Banking Status Ceases appeared first on TaxGuru.
